top_signals.title: Policy paper: HM Treasury Market Engagement Group
top_signals.summary: A senior‑level forum for financial market participants to share their views on UK-related developments in financial markets, including gilts and sterling, and broader market themes with the Chancellor of the Exchequer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Wargaming for Improved Acquisition: What Does It Take?
top_signals.summary:
A few months ago, I attended a panel discussion for a wargame simulating rapid industrial mobilization for armed conflict. Conducted by a leading university, with teams composed of former senior defense officials, the game probed how government and industry collaboration would play out given minimal coordination before the onset of a crisis. On the panel, the defense leaders confessed how infrequently they engaged with industry in real life to plan for a national emergency. This declared lack of public-private planning for large-scale conflict matches what I’ve experienced as a defense planner and wargame developer: Outside of rhetorical claims at annual

The post Wargaming for Improved Acquisition: What Does It Take? appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Funding: Is the bitcoin bottom in? Crypto funds weigh in
top_signals.summary: Crypto funds share their outlook on bitcoin, the biggest risks ahead, and where they see the best risk-reward opportunities today.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: LBMA Says Gold Still Holds Safe Haven Status (Correct)
top_signals.summary: London Bullion Market Association CEO Ruth Crowell thinks the narrative of gold's status as a safe haven still holds. She adds that it's important to measure safe haven status in years rather than weeks or months. She speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Corrects video to the right interview guest)  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Social media ban will make children ‘happier’, says Starmer
top_signals.summary: PM announces that he expects ban on under-16s using some platforms to be in place early next year

top_signals.summary: The US president promised ‘unconditional surrender’, but the Islamic republic survived with its leverage enhanced
